reasoning: The control AC-4(2) focuses on enforcing secure information flow and using protected processing domains. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring secure network communication and data flow between pods and services. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, while TLS ensures secure communication for Ingress resources. Service mesh solutions like Istio can enforce mTLS for secure service-to-service communication.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | processing domains use protected processing domai
